title: Genie APIs and Research Agent in Beta
body:
* **Genie Create and Update APIs in Beta**: Genie Create and Update APIs have been released to Beta. Get API has been updated to allow users to retrieve a serialized definition of the Genie Space. See the [Genie API](https://docs.databricks.com/api/workspace/genie).
* **Research Agent in Beta**: Research Agent extends Genie's capabilities to help you uncover deeper insights and tackle complex business questions using multi-step reasoning and hypothesis testing. See [Agent mode in Genie Agents](/aws/en/genie/agent-mode).
